title: Awesome update log
content: ***. One more star reserved for a big discount on the pro/unlimited version of the app( the one with pink icon) :) *** This is what I expect from all devs, a detailed update/change log. Most developers/companies are lazy or just don’t care about users and mention “bug fix” and be done with it. God knows what they have fixed and if it is really fixed or not.
